name: Rush Stool
description: A woven three-legged stool, light enough to drag anywhere.

name: Driftwood Armchair
description: A deep chair built from sea-smoothed timber and a quilted cushion.

name: Round Tea Table
description: A little round table just big enough for two cups and a pot.

name: Cedar Bookshelf
description: A tall shelf for almanacs, jars, and finds from the tide line.

name: Tide-Wool Rug
description: A flat woven rug in sea-glass greens that warms a bare floor.

name: Lantern Stand
description: A wrought stand with a warm lantern that glows after dark.

name: Potted Fern
description: A redwood-forest fern in a hand-thrown ceramic pot.

name: Harvest Banner
description: A pressed-flower banner that hangs proudly along the wall.

name: Festival Bunting
description: A string of bright triangular flags saved from a fair.

name: Trophy Shelf
description: A display shelf that fills with keepsakes as you reach milestones.

name: Curio Cabinet
description: A glass-front cabinet for shells, geodes, and small wonders.

name: Window Planter
description: A low box of herbs and blooms that brightens any corner.
